{{Relic Infobox|Arcane Scroll|2}}{{R|Arcane Scroll||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}.

Upon pickup, add a random {{QueryLink|Cards|rarity:Rare|Rare Card|2}} to your Deck.

== Sources ==
At the start of the run, can be offered by {{KW|Neow||2}}.

== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.98'''
**Added Arcane Scroll to the game.
